subject: Weekly digest: round table track in Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q2 review | INIT-3293
body: Intelligence from Canberra indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the round table banner. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Albert Einstein and Katherine Johnson. Reference initiative INIT-3293. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: coordination, coffee.
